title: Consistent Sprint
description: Boosts base sprinting speed to match jumping momentum and removing speed boost when sprint-jumping, removing the need for constant "bunny hopping" to travel quickly. For a more calm and immersive experience.
body:
### A simple mod that makes sprint-jumping the same speed as sprinting. When sprinting (and not strafing), the player exponentially accelerates to a set target speed (configurable, 6.36 by default).

Hopefully, this makes movement a calmer and more immersive experience.

Sprinting and sprint-jumping always have the same speed.
Includes 3 presets for base and target sprinting speeds, configurable via Mod Menu:
1. 5.61 blocks/second
2. 6.36 blocks/second
3. 7.12 blocks/second


The time taken to reach the target speed is also configurable (3 seconds by default).

Works with the Sinytra Connector.


<details>
<summary>Future goals</summary>
  
Reworking the mod (I wasn't able to implement my full vision yet due to my current modding skills). I aim to completely overhaul minecraft movement.

2x hunger consumption at top speed.

Increased configurability for all settings.

Create a GitHub repo and update the license.

Release for 1.19.2 (Forge) and 1.21.1 (Fabric/NeoForge).

In-game configuration support for Forge.

Redo this modpage in a architectural manual theme. properly explain mod. upload some visuals.
</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
My first mod let's go!!!
Shout-out to gemini for reviving the project. it is a very simple mod but even this was tiring me as am new to this. Really came in clutch.
</details>
